# Version

**Data field**

One byte.

## Overview

Set to 0.

## Data fields

- **Flags**: Three bytes.
- **Name**: An array of bytes, constituting a UTF-8 string, containing the name.

items.description: An array of bytes, constituting a UTF-8 string, containing the name.
